name: Pegroco Invest AB (publ)
summary: Pegroco Invest AB (publ) is a private equity and venture capital firm specializing in bridge financing, mezzanine financing, buyouts, acquisition and turnarounds. The firm seeks minority or majority stakes. The firm typically invests in early stage, mid stage, late stage, middle markets, and mature stages. It primarily focuses on unlisted companies, predominantly in Sweden. The firm seeks to invest in the energy and clean technology sector. It considers investments between SEK 1 million ($0.14 million) and SEK 10 million ($1.40 million) in companies having an enterprise value between SEK 10 million ($1.24 million) and SEK 500 million ($61.85 million). The firm invests in companies with a turnover between SEK 50 million ($7.02 million) and SEK 300 million ($42.11 million). Pegroco Invest AB publ was founded in 2007 and is based in G√É¬∂teborg, Sweden with an additional office in Stockholm, Sweden.
